failures.description: The agent misread or misused the catalog search result, choosing item 1507389580 at $1157.86 even though item 5339029584 at $1128.99 was cheaper.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The tool output at index 3 clearly returned two available smartphones sorted by ascending price: item 5339029584 at $1128.99, then item 1507389580 at $1157.86. At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer from that tool output but selected the more expensive second item as the cheapest. This contradicts the relevant tool output and directly caused the wrong final answer.
